$comment: External docs sources. Each repo listed here may expose a `site/` directory laid out as site/<locale>/<...>.md. The sync script (scripts/sync-content.mjs) pulls that content into src/content/docs/_ext/<name>/ at build time, where <name> also becomes the URL namespace (e.g. /bcx/getting-started). See README for the full convention. The optional `order` (lower sorts first) controls where the source's section lands in the sidebar without editing the upstream repo; omit it to fall back to the section index page's `order`.
